import React from 'react'; import { Helmet } from 'react-helmet-async'; import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'; const UserDashboard = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); return ( <> Dashboard - Impact Foundation

Welcome back, {user?.name}!

Manage your donations and track your impact here.

Total Donations

₹{user?.totalDonations || 0}

Donation Count

{user?.donationCount || 0}

KYC Status

{user?.kycStatus || 'Pending'}

Quick Actions

); }; export default UserDashboard;
